title: Remove parentheses and content from Metta and IFS titles in quiz score display

requirements.text: In the quiz score display heading (h2) on the KnowledgePage, remove the parenthetical text and its surrounding parentheses from the Metta and IFS category titles. For example, 'Metta (Loving-Kindness)' should become 'Metta', and 'IFS (Internal Family Systems)' should become 'IFS'. The change must apply wherever those category titles are rendered in the quiz score context identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/h2[1].

quotes: remove parentheses with its content inside, for Metta, and IFS

acceptanceCriteria: The quiz score h2 heading displays 'Metta' without any parenthetical suffix.
The quiz score h2 heading displays 'IFS' without any parenthetical suffix.
No other category titles are altered.
The styled score badge and overall quiz score design remain unchanged.

constraints: Only modify the quiz score display title rendering for Metta and IFS — do not change any other part of the UI or data.
nonGoals: Changing the underlying category data or identifiers stored in knowledgeContent.ts or backend.
Modifying the carousel category titles outside of the quiz score display context.
Altering the quiz score badge styling introduced in the previous version.
